meta.incident: nginx upstream latency escalating -> connect timeouts on all backends -> all upstream group failed (502s) -> nginx worker OOM-killed -> 503s until worker restart, amid recurring TLS cert expiry warnings

ground_truth.desc: Upstream response time warnings before failure

ground_truth.needle: upstream connect timeout after 2000ms: no live backends available
ground_truth.desc: All backends timing out, none available

ground_truth.needle: all backends in upstream group failed: no live backends, returning 502 to client
ground_truth.desc: nginx giving up on all upstream backends

ground_truth.needle: nginx worker process killed: received sigkill from kernel oom-killer

ground_truth.desc: Individual request 502 errors due to timeout

context_loss: upstream connect timeout after 2000ms: no live backends available
